_publications._publicationTitle: Genetically mediated Nf1 loss in mice promotes diverse radiation-induced tumors modeling second malignant neoplasms.

_contextSnippet: for Nf1+/− mice tumor incidence increased with increasing radiation dose (p < 0.0001 by χ2 analysis, Figure 2)...sarcomas...were significantly more common in irradiated Nf1+/− mice than irradiated WT mice (p = 0.0175, log-rank)
details: Tumor incidence increased with increasing radiation dose (p < 0.0001 by χ2 analysis). Sarcomas were significantly more common in irradiated Nf1+/- mice than irradiated WT mice (p = 0.0175)
